utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Triskaidekaphobia .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: The fear of Triscuts !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No ! No , fear of the number 13 .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is possible , they have really sharp edges .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right Chandler , you are up .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Wait a minute , I ... I believe I am entitled to use my Angel Pass for a free turn ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: This game makes no sense !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You know what ? You are just upset because you are losing .

emotion_cause.span: 8_You are just upset because you are losing .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh come on Ross , I think we are all losers here .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I think we are all losers here .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right . Chandler , you can either spin the wheel or pick a Google card .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Let me think . Let me think ... Oh ! I do not care .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You ... you must choose Mr . Bing .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Either , it makes no difference .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Choose , you jackass !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I will take a card .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Okay , you picked the Gimmie card ! You get all of Ross points !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What ? !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: This game is kinda fun .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You do not think it is a little crazy that you get all my points just cause you

emotion_cause.span: 19_You do not think it is a little crazy that you get all my points just cause you

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I do not think the contestants are supposed to speak to each other .
